notes: Derived stats computed as the library grows. Based on 9 transitions from Black Book x Defected V2 (house/techno, ~129 BPM). Three proposal versions tested: V21 (baseline), V23 (rules baked in), V24 (Sam's corrections to V23).

v23_stats.label: V23 — rules baked in (R1 boundary, R2 two-stage bass, R4 low sneak)
v23_stats.automated_score: 2/9 (tool-reported — noisy due to V22 arrangement changes)
regressions: T7 moved from accepted boundary to outro (over-correction)
arrangement_noise: T9 — V22 arrangement changes make comparison unreliable

v24_stats.label: V24 — Sam's corrections to V23
v24_stats.effective_score: ~8/9 (after discounting arrangement changes on T8 and T9)

corrections.T4_real: swap 2368→2304 (-64 beats). Caused by two bugs: (A) priority 2 outro lacked boundary check, (B) Rule 2 pushed full kill to boundary. Both fixed.
corrections.T8_arrangement: Professor X shortened to end at swap. Trailing points removed, instant vol kill. Swap@4592 was correct.
corrections.T9_arrangement: Kids/Deep House shifted -32 beats. Same relative swap position (64 beats into overlap). Two-stage bass removed but confounded by arrangement shift.

bugs_fixed: Priority 2 (outro) now uses _inside_overlap() for boundary avoidance
Rule 2 (two-stage bass) now checks kill_beat against _inside_overlap() before enabling

accuracy_progression.V23: ~7/9 (78%) — rules baked in, with known bugs
accuracy_progression.V24_effective: ~8/9 (89%) — after bug fixes, only T4 was a real correction

patterns.swap_at_boundary_exception: T7 — resolved in V24, Sam accepted outro fallback@4256
